1	name: Tests / Code Coverage
2	on:
3	  pull_request:
4	  merge_group:
5	  push:
6	    branches:
7	      - main
8	
9	permissions:
10	  contents: write
11	  pull-requests: write
12	
13	concurrency:
14	  group: ci-${{ github.ref }}-tests
15	  cancel-in-progress: true
16	
17	jobs:
18	  split-test-files:
19	    runs-on: depot-ubuntu-22.04-4
20	    steps:
21	      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
22	      - uses: actions/setup-go@v6
23	        with:
24	          go-version: "1.25.9"
25	          check-latest: true
26	      - name: Create a file with all core Cosmos SDK pkgs
27	        run: go list ./... > pkgs.txt
28	      - name: Split pkgs into 4 files
29	        run: split -d -n l/4 pkgs.txt pkgs.txt.part.
30	      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
31	        with:
32	          name: "${{ github.sha }}-00"
33	          path: ./pkgs.txt.part.00
34	      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
35	        with:
36	          name: "${{ github.sha }}-01"
37	          path: ./pkgs.txt.part.01
38	      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
39	        with:
40	          name: "${{ github.sha }}-02"
41	          path: ./pkgs.txt.part.02
42	      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
43	        with:
44	          name: "${{ github.sha }}-03"
45	          path: ./pkgs.txt.part.03
46	
47	  tests:
48	    runs-on: depot-ubuntu-22.04-4
49	    needs: split-test-files
50	    strategy:
51	      fail-fast: false
52	      matrix:
53	        part: ["00", "01", "02", "03"]
54	    steps:
55	      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
56	      - uses: actions/setup-go@v6
57	        with:
58	          go-version: "1.25.9"
59	          check-latest: true
60	          cache: true
61	          cache-dependency-path: go.sum
62	      - uses: technote-space/get-diff-action@v6.1.2
63	        id: git_diff
64	        with:
65	          PATTERNS: |
66	            **/*.go
67	            go.mod
68	            go.sum
69	            **/go.mod
70	            **/go.sum
71	            **/Makefile
72	            Makefile
73	      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v7
74	        with:
75	          name: "${{ github.sha }}-${{ matrix.part }}"
76	      - name: test & coverage report creation

file.content:
name: Tests / Code Coverage
on:
  pull_request:
  merge_group:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

permissions:
  contents: write
  pull-requests: write

concurrency:
  group: ci-${{ github.ref }}-tests
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  split-test-files:
    runs-on: depot-ubuntu-22.04-4
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - uses: actions/setup-go@v6
        with:
          go-version: "1.25.9"
          check-latest: true
      - name: Create a file with all core Cosmos SDK pkgs
        run: go list ./... > pkgs.txt
      - name: Split pkgs into 4 files
        run: split -d -n l/4 pkgs.txt pkgs.txt.part.
      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
        with:
          name: "${{ github.sha }}-00"
          path: ./pkgs.txt.part.00
      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
        with:
          name: "${{ github.sha }}-01"
          path: ./pkgs.txt.part.01
      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
        with:
          name: "${{ github.sha }}-02"
          path: ./pkgs.txt.part.02
      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
        with:
          name: "${{ github.sha }}-03"
          path: ./pkgs.txt.part.03

  tests:
    runs-on: depot-ubuntu-22.04-4
    needs: split-test-files
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        part: ["00", "01", "02", "03"]
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - uses: actions/setup-go@v6
        with:
          go-version: "1.25.9"
          check-latest: true
          cache: true
          cache-dependency-path: go.sum
      - uses: technote-space/get-diff-action@v6.1.2
        id: git_diff
        with:
          PATTERNS: |
            **/*.go
            go.mod
            go.sum
            **/go.mod
            **/go.sum
            **/Makefile
            Makefile
      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v7
        with:
          name: "${{ github.sha }}-${{ matrix.part }}"
      - name: test & coverage report creation
        if: env.GIT_DIFF
        run: |
          cat pkgs.txt.part.${{ matrix.part }} | xargs go test -mod=readonly -race -timeout 30m -coverprofile=${{ matrix.part }}profile.out -covermode=atomic -tags='ledger test_ledger_mock'
      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
        if: env.GIT_DIFF
        with:
          name: "${{ github.sha }}-${{ matrix.part }}-coverage"
          path: ./${{ matrix.part }}profile.out

  test-integration:
    runs-on: depot-ubuntu-22.04-4
    steps:

FROM ubuntu:22.04

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    git \
    build-essential \
    pkg-config \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

    tar -C /usr/local -xzf go.tar.gz && \
    rm go.tar.gz

ENV PATH="/usr/local/go/bin:${PATH}"
ENV GOPATH="/go"
ENV PATH="${GOPATH}/bin:${PATH}"

WORKDIR /app
COPY repo/ /app/

RUN go version

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
